sessionStart.command: Set-Variable `# <#` > /dev/null 2>&1; $(command -v python3 || command -v python) "${CURSOR_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/collect_hook.py" sessionStart; exit #> ; & "$env:CURSOR_PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\run-hook.ps1" sessionStart
